explanations.1: This is an SSH config file where 'Host' is a label you'll use when connecting (like 'ssh MyAmazingApp_PROD'), not the actual server name.
explanations.2: The 'Hostname' is the real IP address or domain that SSH will actually connect to.
explanations.3: The 'User' specifies which username to use for that particular host when you don't explicitly provide one.
